hero.title: cgzdevelopments
hero.tagline: Quality is not an act, it is a habit.
hero.author: Aristotle
about.title: About Me
about.body: Senior Software Developer with over 10 years of experience building services, web applications, and mobile apps. I specialize in VueJS, React, Laravel, and Flutter, with strong database skills in MySQL and PostgreSQL. I'm constantly exploring new technologies and best practices, focused on delivering innovative solutions with high quality and security standards.
services.title: Services
services.web_desc: Full-stack web applications using React, VueJS, and Laravel with responsive, modern UIs.
services.mobile_desc: Cross-platform mobile apps built with Flutter for iOS and Android from a single codebase.
services.app_desc: End-to-end custom software development tailored to your business needs and workflows.
services.testing_desc: Comprehensive testing strategies to ensure quality, reliability, and performance.
contact.title: Contact
contact.body: Let's work together. Reach out via LinkedIn or check my code on GitHub.
